methodology_ruling: ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-IN-MASS-ATROCITY-BY-PROXY (NEW). The published 23.4 priced the UAE as an ordinary mid-band autocracy and does NOT reflect the documented, ongoing UAE financing/arming/mercenary-supply to the RSF in Sudan -- a force the UN FFM (Feb 19, 2026) found bears the 'hallmarks of genocide'. This is scorable active complicity-by-proxy: it pulls INT 1.5->1.2, ACC 1.5->1.2, SYS 2.0->1.5, EMP 2.0->1.5, while preserving BND 3.0 (domestic scope capacity unchanged). It is DISTINCT from the in-territory active-perpetration 0.0 floor (Sudan/Russia/Israel/Myanmar): the UAE is a complicit external sponsor, not an in-territory perpetrator, and the ICJ case (filed March 2025) is unadjudicated -- capping the magnitude and precluding a floor designation. Reconstructs to 18.4 EXACT via computeCompositeFromDimensions (integrationPremium 0; stdDev>1.5 due to preserved BND).
key_evidence: UN Fact-Finding Mission (Feb 19, 2026): RSF attacks bear the 'hallmarks of genocide'; UN documents show UK-origin and Chinese weapons reaching the RSF via the UAE.
Conflict Insights Group (June 2026): UAE continues supplying weapons and foreign mercenaries to the RSF, enabling the El Fasher mass atrocities of October 2025.
Amnesty International: UAE re-exporting Chinese weaponry to the RSF in breach of the UN arms embargo, routed via Libya, Chad, and Uganda.
Sudan filed at the ICJ (March 2025) accusing the UAE of complicity in genocide through extensive financial, political, and military support for the RSF; adjudication pending.
Refugees International (June 8, 2026) call for action citing new evidence of UAE fueling genocide in Sudan.
